spec_compliance.summary_metric_schema: total_findings, modules_reviewed, shallow_count, consolidated_count, files_reviewed (per new spec)
spec_compliance.verification_field: deletion_trace + concrete reappearance trace (per new spec)

metrics.recall: 3/3 (100%) on shallow files (all 3 shallow files surfaced findings)
metrics.borderline_outcome: DP-06 reported with split-rationale (toggle earns, set dead-weight). Diverges from baseline run which classified the whole hook as deep.

per_case.delta_from_baseline: Per-module finding instead of consolidated; severity low (was medium)

per_case.agent_reasoning: toggle is a vocabulary boundary earning weight at 2+ callers (flip closure); set is shallow (setValue already has stable identity). Mixed module reads shallow overall because the dead-weight piece dominates.

consolidation_observation.expected: Phase 2 consolidation rule (3+ identical patterns -> single finding)
consolidation_observation.actual: Per-module finding because intra-file grouping sat below 3+ threshold (2 wrappers, 2 hooks)
consolidation_observation.harness_gap: No fixture exercises consolidation rule. To test, add 3+ identical wrappers in one file or across files.

next: Decide on borderline expectation: tighten use-toggle.ts (drop set parameter) so it stays no_finding, OR update expected.json to detected with split-rationale acceptance.
Add a consolidation fixture (3+ identical wrappers) when the consolidation rule needs to be validated.
Drift hypothesis (in-session memory carry-over) confirmed: fresh agent invocation honored the rebuild spec.
